sections.paragraph: with suff. גַּנִי comm. (f. Gen 2:15), a garden, especially one planted with trees (prop. a place protected with a fence, from the root גָּנַן). Gen 2:8, seq. גַּן הַיֶרֶק a garden of herbs, Deu 11:10 1Ki 21:2. גַּן עֵדֶן the garden of Eden planted by God, Gen 3:24 Joe 2:3 also called גַּן אֱלֹהִים Deu 28:13 31:8 , Deu 31:9and גַּן יְהֹוָה Gen 13:10 Isa 51:3. A garden enclosed, Son 4:12 figuratively used of a chaste woman. Plur. גַּנִּים Son 4:15 6:2 .
